title: rubus × eriothyrsus
intro: Rubus × eriothyrsus, also known as the raspberry-leaved blackberry or hybrid black raspberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rubus genus of bramble plants. The plant's leaves and fruit possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus × eriothyrsus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
